chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 165 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.481/2023 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.482/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.11.2024 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 04.09.2024 and after one year has been passed but no one has turned up to proceed with the matter. The continuous absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interest to pursue the instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
